description.content: Place and manage prediction market orders, query positions, and transfer funds via the Prediction Trading REST API.

exec: // only sign if a signature param was declared and we have a secret
const cryptoKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', keyData, { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const signatureBuffer = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', cryptoKey, msgData);
if (Array.isArray(value) || (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null)) return JSON.stringify(value);
if (str === null || str === undefined) return true;

query.description: List of prediction token IDs to redeem. Not empty. Example: `tokenIds=112233&tokenIds=112234`
Max number of results to return. Default `20`, range 1–50
List of orders to cancel (index `i` starts from 0)
Input amount in wei (18 decimals). Must be > 0. For `MARKET` orders, minimum is approximately 1.5 USDT (varies by market depth). Example: `1000000000000000000` = 1 USDT
Slippage tolerance in basis points. Range 1–10000
Limit price. Required when `orderType=LIMIT`. Must be > 0
Fee rate in basis points. Default `200`, range 1–10000
Auto-transfer amount before order (wei). Must be > 0 if provided
Slippage tolerance in basis points. Range 1–10000
Limit price. Required when `orderType=LIMIT`. Must be > 0
Auto-transfer amount before order (wei). Must be > 0 if provided
Filter by market ID. Must be > 0
Filter by market topic ID. Must be > 0
Transfer amount in wei (18 decimals). Must be > 0. Example: `1000000000000000000` = 1 USDT
Transfer amount in wei (18 decimals). Must be > 0. Example: `1000000000000000000` = 1 USDT
Transfer ID returned from outbound/inbound transfer
Filter by market ID. Must be > 0
Filter by market topic ID. Must be > 0
Position status tab. Values from `PositionQueryType`. Default `ONGOING`
